name: US Compliance Regulations MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from Ansvar Systems for US regulatory compliance. Covers major US regulations including HIPAA, CCPA, SOX, GLBA, FERPA, COPPA, FDA, EPA, FFIEC, NYDFS, and 40+ more frameworks. Enables AI compliance agents to query US regulatory requirements for healthcare, finance, education, privacy, and environmental compliance programs.
use_cases: Querying HIPAA requirements for healthcare data compliance agents
Researching CCPA/CPRA obligations for California privacy compliance agents
Looking up SOX controls for financial reporting compliance agents
Cross-regulation US compliance gap analysis from regulatory affairs agents
not_for: Non-US regulatory frameworks (EU use eu-regulations-mcp instead)
Definitive legal compliance determination — always verify with qualified US legal counsel
Real-time regulatory updates — verify text freshness for recently amended regulations
best_when: A compliance or legal team needs AI agents to query and apply US federal/state regulations — HIPAA, CCPA, SOX, GLBA — during compliance programs, assessments, or regulatory interpretation work across healthcare, finance, education, or privacy domains.
avoid_when: You need state-specific law beyond CCPA/CPRA and NYDFS coverage, or international regulatory frameworks. This focuses on major federal US regulations.

auth.notes: No authentication required — accesses public US regulatory databases.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — US regulations are publicly accessible
pricing.notes: Free open source from Ansvar Systems. US federal regulations are publicly available.

known_agent_gotchas: 40+ US regulations is broad — test which specific regulations your use case requires for depth
US regulations are frequently updated (especially healthcare/privacy) — verify text freshness
NYDFS and CCPA are state regulations with broader applicability — verify jurisdiction applicability
Ansvar Systems compliance tooling specialty provides better regulatory context than generic search
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public US regulation text — non-sensitive. No auth. HTTPS. Always verify with qualified US legal counsel for formal compliance programs. HIPAA context means related data queries may be sensitive.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public US regulations. No auth. HTTPS. Legal research tool — expert validation required.
